title: Let me have them!
description: Allows you to pick up arrows from any source.
body:
A simple datapack allowing for the player to pick up any arrow regardless of origin.\
![Gif of person blocking a skeleton's arrow, then picking it up](https://i.imgur.com/DYJq6KB.gif)

**Not Multiplayer Compatible** *(Well not technically)*
---
The mod also allows players to pick up arrows shot from infinity bows, meaning any players, *including those without infinity bows,* can have infinite arrows.
